content.en:
Rumble!!!!!

Ye Tian's Reincarnation Haotian Body, Reincarnation Haotian Origin, and Origin Realm Will are all slowly breaking through, the bottleneck is shattered, and the aura is constantly increasing.

After a long time, his body began to transform, and his realm was breaking through.

Gradually, he stepped into the third level of equilibrium.

At this time, he found that the balance power fused by his three forces became stronger and stronger, obviously this path was very correct, and after nine balances, the three forces all became one, and that was the real horror.

It's been another time.

At this time, Ye Tian's realm was stable.

"My current strength should be equivalent to the six-time Awakening Origin Upper Realm Overlord, or even more powerful, if I use the Reincarnation Treasure, I should not be weak in the face of those Origin Upper Realm Overlords who have not been reincarnated by the Seven Origin Awakenings on the other side. Ye Tian thought to himself.

With such strength, except for those sleeping ancient existences, he is almost invincible.

However, he was very low-key, and the other Origin Upper Realm Overlords didn't know what his strength was.

As the years passed, gradually, the reincarnation golden worm would also leave the ruins of reincarnation, and when the time came, the overlords of the Origin Upper Realm would also be able to go to the ruins of reincarnation to find resources, without worrying about the reincarnation golden worm attacking them.

At this time.

Ye Tian also copied several reincarnation golden insects to copy their bodies, preparing to return to the nest with other reincarnation golden insects when the time came.

this day.

Ye Tian's reincarnation golden worm replicated the body and felt the summoning and attraction, and instinctively wanted to return to the nest.

Moreover, this instinct is difficult to resist.

He didn't resist either, and returned directly to the reincarnation golden worm nest.

The replica bodies of several reincarnation golden worms that he copied entered a total of three reincarnation golden worm nests, which were at different nodes.

Whoa!!!

A large number of reincarnation gold worms disappeared from the ruins of reincarnation, and in an instant, there was not a single reincarnation gold worm found in the ruins of reincarnation.

After returning to the reincarnation golden worm's nest, Ye Tian's eyes were fixed on the trees containing the reincarnation true liquid inside the nest, and just when he wanted to dig up the trees and take away the reincarnation true liquid, one by one the reincarnation golden worms began to sleep.

And his replica body began to sleep, unable to resist that force.

"No wonder there is not a single reincarnation gold worm in the ruins of reincarnation, once you return to the nest, you will sleep during this period, you will all sleep, where can you go out!"

Airplanes!

Several reincarnation golden worm replica bodies fell asleep without resistance, and even the real body replica body could not wake up the sleeping reincarnation golden worm replica body.

"I can only give up these reincarnation golden worms to copy the body, otherwise it will be a complete waste to occupy the number of copies of the body!"

Subsequently.

Ye Tian lifted the replica bodies of these reincarnation golden worms, and in an instant, these reincarnation golden worm replica bodies turned into ashes.

"The secrets contained in the reincarnation golden worm nest are not small, those eight-time awakened Origin Upper Realm overlords have not studied it for countless years, and I can't study it at present, and when the strength reaches the level of the Origin Ancestor in the future, maybe I can hope to understand the secret of the reincarnation golden worm nest!" Ye Tian said darkly.

......

After all the reincarnation golden worms disappeared, the forces of the land on the other side of eternity also began to re-enter the ruins of reincarnation, and for a long time, they would no longer worry about the reincarnation golden worms.

At this time.

Ye Tian was also preparing to let the Tianshan Pavilion enter the ruins of reincarnation.

The Overlord of the Origin Upper Realm can enter the ruins of reincarnation at will, but those Heavenly Ancestors of the Origin Upper Realm cannot break the barriers, and to enter the ruins of reincarnation, they need to go through a specific passage to enter.

And those specific passages were also opened up by using the magic circle to form a portal, which could allow the Origin Upper Realm Heavenly Ancestor to enter.

Such a magic array is also extremely rare, there are overlord-level forces such as the Ancient Heavenly Palace and the Town Heaven Boundary City, but there are no Tianshan Pavilion.

However, such a magic circle is not too complicated, and with his current realm, it can be created in a little time.

Thereupon.

In the following years, Ye Tian researched and created a magic circle to enter the ruins of reincarnation in the land of eternity, and after more than 100,000 years of research, he initially created such a magic circle.

However, such a circle is still only a start-up, it is not stable, and it needs to be improved.

Then, he continued to research and create, and it took more than half a million years of the primeval era to perfect it.

This magic circle, Ye Tian named it the Ruin Shuttle Array.

Subsequently, he used a lot of good materials to build the ruin shuttle array, opening up a portal to the ruins of reincarnation.

Of course.

It is pointless to just build a good ruin shuttle array, and you have to occupy the treasure land of the ruins of reincarnation, so that you can strengthen the Tianshan Pavilion, otherwise let the Lord of Ice and Rain and the Lord of the Wind Fang go to the ruins of reincarnation by themselves, and a hundred lives will not be enough!

And Ye Tian really found a lot of ownerless treasure land, he wandered in the ruins of reincarnation for a long time, naturally found a lot of treasure land, some are very dangerous, but some treasure land is not dangerous, and the resources in it are not bad.

Although it was useless to him, it was very helpful to Tianshan Pavilion.

Thereupon.

He wiped out the powerful creatures in those treasure lands, and then built the magic circle, and these treasure lands belonged to the Tianshan Pavilion.

Knowing that they could enter the ruins of reincarnation, the Lord of the Wind Fangs was immediately extremely excited.

"Thank you, Lord of the Infinite!"

The Lord of the Wind Teeth said excitedly.

Ye Tian also advised: "Except for these treasures occupied by our Tianshan Pavilion, other places, you don't go casually, otherwise I won't have time to save you!"

"Yes!"

The Lord of the Wind Fang, the Lord of Ice and Rain, and many other Heavenly Ancestors of the Origin Upper Realm responded one after another.

Subsequently.

The Lord of the Wind Tooth entered the few treasures occupied by the Tianshan Pavilion, looking for resources in them, and there were not many dangers, and they could be sharpened, and the harvest was naturally a lot.

And Ye Tian also started a new round of retreat cultivation, after all, he had obtained a lot of resources, and even the reincarnation true liquid, there were still many that had not been used.

It can be said that the resources he has now are more than enough to help him break through to the fourth balance, but it will take a long time.

For Ye Tian, if he broke through to the fourth balance realm, coupled with the reincarnation treasure, he would dare to challenge those eight-time awakened Origin Upper Realm overlords, that is, to deal with ancient beings such as Desolate Ancestors.

......

Time flies.

Ye Tian's cultivation was improving rapidly, and Tianshan Pavilion was also giving birth to Origin Upper Realm Heavenly Ancestors one after another, and more and more other level geniuses were recruited.

Gradually, the status of Tianshan Pavilion in the middle of the land of eternity became higher and higher, and its reputation became louder and louder.
